artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a central UPOL recommendations page for use of generative AI models and a Faculty of Education student information page. The central English page provides the substantive university-wide evidence used for claim candidates. The Faculty of Education page was retained only as faculty-scoped context. A search-result seed on ai.upol.cz returned 404, and an e-resources news page was rejected as low-specificity news/tool-access content rather than policy guidance.

targets.sourceTitle: UP's recommendations for the use of generative AI models

expectedThemes: link to central UP AI recommendations

stopConditions: Stop after official UPOL pages support narrow claim candidates.
Do not infer university-wide binding policy from faculty-only guidance.
Record inaccessible or low-specificity official sources as source_rejection artifacts.

artifacts.sourceTitle: UP's recommendations for the use of generative AI models

artifacts.claimText: UP's generative AI recommendations state that AI systems at Palacky University Olomouc must be used in compliance with UP ethical principles and as tools to improve knowledge, skills, teaching, research, management, administration, or editing rather than as a full replacement for creative activity.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI use must align with UP ethical principles and responsible tool use.

citation.citationTitle: UP's recommendations for the use of generative AI models

artifacts.claimText: UP's recommendations state that generative AI use in professional texts and other creative work must be declared, and that staff and students may not claim authorship of texts or other creative outputs generated using AI.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Declare generative AI use in professional or creative work; do not claim authorship of AI-generated outputs.

citation.citationTitle: UP's recommendations for the use of generative AI models
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UP's recommendations warn that personal data, sensitive information, and potential UP intellectual property entered into AI systems must be handled responsibly because such data is usually made available to a third party and control over it may be lost.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Handle personal data, sensitive information, and intellectual property responsibly when using AI systems.

citation.citationTitle: UP's recommendations for the use of generative AI models

artifacts.claimText: UP's recommendations say that if an educator uses AI in any form of assessment of student activities, such as evaluating written work, the assessment should include the educator's own assessment and not be made solely by AI.
artifacts.normalizedValue: AI-supported student assessment should include educator assessment and not rely solely on AI.

Approved because the cited UP text explicitly states declaration and authorship limits for generative AI outputs.
Approved as a privacy and IP handling warning directly supported by the UP recommendations page.
Approved as a teaching and assessment claim scoped to the recommendation that educator assessment should not be replaced solely by AI.

artifacts.title: Palacky University Olomouc Generative AI Recommendations
artifacts.summary: Staged review found an official Palacky University Olomouc recommendations page for generative AI models. The page supports candidate claims on ethical-principle alignment, declaration and authorship limits, privacy and sensitive-data handling, and human educator involvement when AI is used in assessment. A Faculty of Education page was verified but used only as faculty-scoped context. A stale ai.upol.cz seed and an e-resources news feed were rejected.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The ai.upol.cz/doporuceni/ seed returned 404 during this crawl and was not used as evidence.
Faculty of Education material was treated as faculty-scoped context, not as a university-wide binding policy source.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
